_comment: Pinned AM April 2026 monthly compensation. Joy is the AM manager (excluded from rep commission summary; gets manager incentive on team payment). Vivin left the org (deals still count toward team total per policy, but he gets no payout). Joy's payment received includes the $17,500 Washington Post — Dropbox & PS server-split exception. Manager commission is reduced by the $78 carry-forward balance from Q1 2026 (Wipro slab adjustment).

exception.note: Server split exception: of the $31,410.60 Washington Post Dropbox + PS deal, $17,500 is attributed to Joy. Added to her April payment received (was $13,632.32 + $17,500 = $31,132.32).

commission.eligibility_text: Monthly plan: a minimum of 60% achievement of the individual quota is required for commission. Below 60% → 0% slab. Managed-deal incentive: 5% on managed deals (AM team only).

manager_incentive.exception_note: Joy's April income includes the $17,500 Washington Post — Dropbox & PS server-split exception (allocated to her from the $31,410.60 deal per the attached SOW).

pending_commissions.deal_name: NerdsToGo — New Deal — DropBox to MS (Carolina Contracting)
pending_commissions.note: Q1 FY2026 deal paid in April — commission at Q1 rate (1.5%).

pending_commissions.deal_name: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. — Existing MSP Client — Slack to Teams
pending_commissions.note: Q1 FY2026 deal paid in April — commission at Q1 rate (1.5%).

pending_commissions.deal_name: Artnet — New Deal — MS to Google
pending_commissions.note: Q1 FY2026 deal paid in April — commission at Q1 rate (1.5%).

manager_incentive.pending_commission_note: Three Q1 FY2026 deals whose payment was received in April. Commission is calculated at the Q1 rate (1.5%) and paid in this cycle.

clawbacks.label: Q1 2026 carry-forward (Wipro slab adjustment)
clawbacks.note: Carry-forward balance from Q1 2026 (Wipro Q4 deal cancellation slab adjustment of −$78). Deducted from this month's manager payout.

manager_incentive.calculation_note: Joy April manager commission: $73,737 (HubSpot $56,237 + Washington Post exception $17,500) × 3% (81-99% manager tier) = $2,212.12. Plus Q1 FY2026 pending deals (NerdsToGo, Church & Dwight, Artnet — total $28,481 × 1.5%) = +$427.22. Minus Q1 2026 Wipro carry-forward $78 = $2,561.34.
